title: BLNK Stock Analyst Forecasts and EPS Predictions
text: BLNK Stock Analyst Forecasts and Financial Projections. Price Target. No price target currently available. Earnings Per Share EPS Forecasts. Based on 6 analysts: 2026: -$0.35 average (range: -$0.40 to -$0.28), 2027: -$0.22 average (range: -$0.23 to -$0.22), 2028: -$0.13 average (range: -$0.18 to -$0.08). Revenue Forecasts. 2026: $109.4M (+5.68% growth), 2027: $130.9M (+26.45% growth), 2028: $176.4M (+70.33% growth). Key Metrics. Revenue Growth Rate: 18.46% forecast (outpacing both industry and market averages), Return on Equity: 27.13% (characterized as strong), Return on Assets: 11.01%. The company faces continued losses through 2028, though losses are projected to narrow. Revenue growth projections significantly exceed both the Engineering and Construction industry average and broader US market expectations.
